{"file_path":"/home/runner/work/Kody-Engine-Tester/Kody-Engine-Tester/.kody/tasks/decompose-2625-260418-095233/composed-leaping-hamming.md","content":"# Plan: Add `src/utils/configValidator.ts` with tests

## Context

The Kody CLI `decompose --no-compose` command needs a config validator to ensure the `.kody/config.json` file is well-formed before decompose runs. A robust validator prevents silent failures or cryptic errors when the config is malformed. The project already has a `Result<T, E>` discriminated union in `src/utils/result.ts` and co-located test files (`*.test.ts`) in `src/utils/`. This new validator will reuse both patterns.

## Pattern Discovery Report

- **Utility module pattern** (`src/utils/debounce.ts`, `src/utils/flatten.ts`): Single-function files in `src/utils/` with co-located `.test.ts` files. Reuse for `configValidator.ts`.
